patch.value: Slim guided-error boilerplate in agent contexts; lead unknown-command Examples with the did-you-mean candidate

agent-UX audit F8/F9: every guided error injects a constant 'Why' line + generic 'pm --help' Examples (150-210 tokens of noise). Drop/shorten the constant Why in --json/agent contexts; when a did-you-mean candidate exists lead Examples with it instead of an alphabetical command dump.
